description:
Advances: specled.spec_review

branch_guard_untethered_test means "test tags subject A but coverage records exercise MFAs owned only by subject B" (concepts.md). Today the finding's subject_id is the *claimed* subject, so render_subject_link (lib/specled_ex/review/html.ex:600) badges the wrong card. The reviewer follows the badge to subject A and finds nothing.

Render a second link to the *actual* subject (B) when the finding payload carries an actual_subject_id (or equivalent — verify the field name in lib/specled_ex/coverage_triangulation.ex:348). Display as "claims A, hits B" so the misalignment is the headline.

comments.text: IMPLEMENTED Session: Log: ~/.claude-personal/projects/-Users-mz-src-specled-ex/.jsonl Stage worktree: /Users/mz/src/specled_ex-quj.5 Stage branch: specled_-quj.5/untethered-actual-subject Commit: 75d87f17c31a0763bdae8be051e285ca35681d4f Files touched: - lib/specled_ex/review/html.ex - test/specled_ex/review/html_test.exs Tests added: 7 in SpecLedEx.Review.HtmlTest under "render_findings_list — untethered_test claims/hits link" - claims A / hits B anchors when observed_owners present - claimed subject precedes observed in rendered string - multiple observed owners render as comma-separated anchors - fallback to single link when observed_owners missing - fallback to single link when observed_owners is empty list - non-untethered findings still render single link (regression guard) - untethered finding without subject_id still renders observed owners Verification stubs flipped: none (existing stub mix test test/specled_ex/review/html_test.exs already executes; the new tests run under it). Summary: Verified the finding payload field name in lib/specled_ex/coverage_triangulation.ex:355 — it is observed_owners, a sorted list of subject ids (NOT actual_subject_id as the ticket guessed). render_findings_list now passes the full finding map to render_subject_link, which gains a clause for branch_guard_untethered_test that emits "claims A, hits B" so the misalignment is the headline. Findings without observed_owners (or with an empty list) fall back to the prior single-anchor rendering. mix test (610 tests) and mix spec.check both pass on the stage worktree.

title: Untethered test finding links to actual subject, not just claimed
